name: Orin O'Brien
abstract: Orin O'Brien (born 1935) is an American double bassist. She was a member of the New York Philharmonic, joining in 1966 under the direction of Leonard Bernstein; she was the first woman to join the orchestra.

concerts.label: Concert by the St. Cecilia Club
Composer's One-Man Shows: Music of Gunther Schuller

works.t: Piano Quintet in A Major D. 667, "Die Forelle"

concerts.label: Manhattan School of Music Chamber Sinfonia

works.t: Symphony No. 1 in D Major, Op. 25, "Classical"

about_quotes.speaker: Michael Moore
about_quotes.evidence: And then when I moved to Manhattan I studied with Orin O’Brien, who is a lady bassist in the philharmonic.
about_quotes.doc_title: Michael Moore interviewed by Monk Rowe, Chautauqua, New York, September 12, 1997
